vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR removes the pre-allocation logic in the KV cache manager, which seems to be unnecessary in current vLLM.
The pre-allocation logic was introduced among the first few PRs for V1 re-architecture.
Originally, it had two purposes:

As written in the comment, we wanted to reduce the overheads of m

vllm.title: [Kernel] Support Microsoft Runtime Kernel Lib for our Low Precision Computation - BitBLAS
vllm.author: LeiWang1999
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Hi all, this PR introduces support for the Microsoft Runtime Kernel Library to enhance our low precision computation capabilities.
Brief Introduction of BitBLAS
BitBLAS is a library to support mixed-precision BLAS operations on GPUs, for example, the $W_{wdtype}A_{adtype}$ mixed-precision matrix mul

vllm.title: [FEAT][ROCm] Integrate Paged Attention Kernel from AITER
vllm.author: vllmellm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR integrates Paged Attention Kernel from AITER (AI Tensor Engine for ROCm)
The pa_fwd_asm kernel from AITER is integrated as a new paged attention op in /vllm/attention/ops/rocm_aiter_paged_attn.py and implemented into the ROCM attention backend in /vllm/attention/backends/rocm_flash_attn.py.

MinIO is an object storage service compatible with the S3 protocol.
It is commonly used by setting the environment variables AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID, AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, and AWS_ENDPOINT_URL.
For example: https://github.com/run-ai/runai-model-streamer/blob/master/cpp/s3/s3.h#L31

vllm.title: Add assertion for no objects while hashing hf_config
vllm.author: zou3519
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
We make the assumption that the hf_config is serializable. If there are any object ids in it, it will cause torch.compile to recompile every time the object id changes (which is always on warm start).
Test Plan:

ran python benchmark_latency.py (smoke test)

Enable structured decoding on V1 TPU.
The workflow changes from model forward -> select hidden states -> sample from hidden (compute logits + sampler) to
model forward -> select hidden states -> compute logits -> structured decode -> sampler
The change has been verified no recompilation.

vllm.title: [V1][DP] More robust DP/EP dummy request coordination
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The current mechanism for coordinating dummy forward passes between DP ranks is not very intuitive and there may be a race condition.
This changes to keep track of a sequence number for request "waves" which should be more robust and reduce the number of control messages that need to be sent. Also r

vllm.title: [BugFix] Revert ROCm Custom Paged Attention Env Flag Check
vllm.author: vllmellm
vllm.bodyExcerpt: #15001 Removes envs.VLLM_ROCM_CUSTOM_PAGED_ATTN from the use_rocm_custom_paged_attention check. This might cause vllm to use rocm custom paged attention even when the flag is not set. This PR reverts the check to maintain correctness.

vllm.title: [misc] tune some env vars for GB200
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
When NCCL_CUMEM_ENABLE=0 is set, NCCL will use TCP or IB for cross-node communication, and multi-node NVLink will be disabled. I get very slow all-reduce speed.
To enjoy the benefit of multi-node NVLink, we should not set NCCL_CUMEM_ENABLE=0. Then we can get much faster cross-node communication.
I h

vllm.title: [INTEL-HPU][v0] Port delayed sampling to upstream
vllm.author: xuechendi
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Delayed Sampling is a feature in vllm-hpu-fork which accelerate TPOT and improve output throughput by 1.1x - 1.2x
Delayed Sampling is to postpone actually sampling until input preparation for next token, which shows significant reduction to host CPU overhead.
without delayed sampling => obvious host

vllm.title: [V1] Avoid socket errors during shutdown when requests are in in-flight
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Currently if there are requests in flight when the API server is shutdown via a SIGINT, there can be exception stacktraces in the log because there's an attempt to send an abort to the engine for the cancelled request using a socket that's already closed. We should ignore aborts when the engine is a
